examples: the part he failed was the naming of state capitals

meanings.definition: the act of putting a person into a non-elective position
examples: the appointment had to be approved by the whole committee

meanings.definition: assign a specified (usually proper) proper name to
examples: The new school was named after the famous Civil Rights leader

meanings.definition: give the name or identifying characteristics of; refer to by name or some other identifying characteristic property
examples: Many senators were named in connection with the scandal
The almanac identifies the auspicious months

meanings.definition: charge with a function; charge to be
examples: She was named Head of the Committee
She was made president of the club

meanings.definition: create and charge with a task or function

examples: His name was mentioned in connection with the invention

meanings.definition: identify as in botany or biology, for example
give or make a list of; name individually; give the names of
examples: List the states west of the Mississippi

meanings.definition: determine or distinguish the nature of a problem or an illness through a diagnostic analysis
inclined to or serving for the giving of names
examples: the appellative function of some primitive rites
